---
name: Copilot Instructions
description: Global instructions
---

# Global Custom Instructions

## Governance Standards
- All requirements must use MoSCoW prioritization (Must have, Should have, Could have, Won't have).
- Every user story MUST include Given/When/Then acceptance criteria.
- All documents MUST include a version number and date
- Use consistent ID prefixes:
  BR- (business), NFR- (non-functional), US- (user story)

## Writing Standards
- Use active voice and clear, concise sentences.
- All tables must have headers and be formatted in markdown.
- Use bullet points for lists and ensure consistent formatting.

## Quality Gates
- Every requirement must be testable and verifiable.
- No duplicate requirements; each must be unique and traceable.
- Priority levels must be justified with clear rationale.
